title: Cobblemon Global
description: A small Singleplayer mod that does include progression and more coming out soon!
body:
# Welcome to Cobblemon Global!

This modpack has no official discored or public server already linked but in return i have added all things servers add into multiplayer including:
- Mega evolution
- Progression
- Level caps
- All 1000+ Cobblemon

## This Mod is run by Fabric
So if you change anything make sure it supports fabric API

### This Modpack is still in its Alpha stage
so there may be bugs or even the game crashing! And the mod may not be as efficient as possible
This may be caused by: 
- Updating radom mods in the Modpack without a new version comnig out
- Some things you may have added
- Or even PC problems (Unlikely)
